en: Status: [INNOVATION] Evolver cycle 5 ran but stalled at protocol output phase. System detected evolution_stagnation and stable_success_plateau. Last successful evolutions: 2026-04-09. Last failed: 2026-04-10 (blast radius breach). Recommend manual review.
zh: 状态: [创新] Evolver第5轮运行但在协议输出阶段停滞。系统检测到evolution_stagnation和stable_success_plateau。最近成功演化: 2026-04-09。最近失败: 2026-04-10 (blast radius breach)。建议人工审查。
